verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use official Roblox/Discord/Trello evidence first; otherwise require at least two credible current sources or one current source explicitly citing official Discord. Move codes to expired only when expiry evidence is strong.

sources.name: Official Roblox game page
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Public HTML dateModified is 07/16/2026, identifies Sailor Piece by Shadowrise Devs, max level 20000, and directly lists NEW CODES: KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW. It does not expose rewards, per-code level requirements, or expiry proof for older codes.

sources.name: Official Discord invite
sources.notes: Public invite page was reachable through web view but requires JavaScript and does not expose channel messages/code-list posts, so it was not direct code evidence today.

sources.name: Official Trello board JSON
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Board JSON dateLastActivity remains 2026-06-12T02:16:43.308Z. Direct grep found MASTERY but no July/King update active-code list, so Trello was not decisive current active-list proof.

sources.name: Sailor Piece Wiki Codes
sources.notes: Current search/open text was available and published yesterday. Indexed content supports several retained active codes, keeps the RAIDUPDATENOW level 12,500 + Ascension IV conflict against GamesRadar level 9,000, and conflicts on some older statuses. Used only as conflict context, not official proof.

sources.name: Beebom Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Updated July 5, 2026 and checked July 4. Active list still has five codes: KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, FREECODEFORYALLL3, and BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE. It says codes are found through the official Discord code-list channel, but it lists several retained older codes as expired.

sources.name: Pocket Tactics Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Updated July 13, 2026 and checked July 13. Visible active list has six codes: KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, FREECODEFORYALLL3, BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE, and 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM, with rewards matching the retained newer-code rewards. It lists several retained older codes as expired.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Page modified July 1, 2026; visible table has 10 active codes: RAIDUPDATENOW, KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It says new codes are posted in the official Discord game-announcements channel.

sources.name: GamesRadar Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Last updated July 2, 2026 and says no new codes were found. Current markup lists 10 active codes and explicit level gates: KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED 12,500, RAIDUPDATENOW 9,000, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2 12,500, MASTERY/GHOULUPDATE/RAIDS 7,500, and SMALLDELAYCODESORRY/FREECODEFORYALL/BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON 12,500. It lists several June 9/May codes expired.

sources.name: PCGamesN Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Visible list supports a broad 12-code active set including the June 9 group, FREECODEFORYALLL2, and SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG base/2/3, but its reward bundles for KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM, and FREECODEFORYALLL2 conflict with stronger source agreement.

sources.name: G2A News Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Current search text lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW as NEW with rewards matching the retained values. Direct source was not used for older-code decisions today.

sources.name: Mobalytics Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Direct curl returned HTTP 403 after clearing local proxy variables, but current search text says July 2026 working codes include 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM, 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE, FREECODEFORYALLL3, KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, and RAIDUPDATENOW. Used as supplementary current support for the six-code group.

sources.name: U7BUY Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Page lists all 16 retained active codes plus several old/new-server-only codes. It explicitly says the list was compiled from official Discord announcements and manually verified, but direct Discord messages were not publicly accessible today.

sources.name: Radio Times Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Current search text from the June 15, 2026 article lists a broad June active set including the two Roblox NEW CODES, June milestone codes, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, and HUGEUPDATEWWW. Supplementary only because it is not July-updated and conflicts on older expired codes.

decisions.reason: Official Roblox dateModified is 07/16/2026 and still directly lists only KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW under NEW CODES. No new official code string was found in accessible official sources or current credible third-party pages.

Official Roblox lists it under NEW CODES. Rewards match Beebom, Pocket Tactics, G2A search evidence, U7BUY, and prior multi-source agreement. PCGamesN has a conflicting reward bundle and was not used to change rewards. No stronger level evidence contradicted the retained 12,500 gate.

Official Roblox lists it under NEW CODES and rewards match multiple current sources. GamesRadar still supports level 9,000; indexed Fandom conflicts with 12,500 + Ascension IV, but this was not official enough to change the Level Eligibility Filter.

Beebom, Pocket Tactics, G2A search evidence, Mobalytics search evidence, PCGamesN, U7BUY, Radio Times search evidence, and indexed Fandom evidence list these active/current; Pro Game Guides and GamesRadar list them expired/inactive. No official expiry proof was accessible.

Pocket Tactics, Mobalytics search evidence, PCGamesN, U7BUY, Radio Times search evidence, and indexed Fandom evidence list it active/current; Beebom, Pro Game Guides, and GamesRadar list it expired/inactive. No official expiry proof was accessible.

U7BUY and PCGamesN list it active/current, and U7BUY cites official Discord/manual verification. Beebom, Pocket Tactics, Pro Game Guides, and GamesRadar list it expired/inactive. Kept active because direct official expiry proof was not accessible.

Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, U7BUY, Radio Times search evidence, and indexed Fandom support much of this set as active/current; PCGamesN supports the SORRY/BIGCONTENT/FREECODE subset. Beebom or Pocket Tactics conflict for parts. No official expiry proof was accessible.

U7BUY, PCGamesN, and indexed Fandom list it active/current; Beebom, Pocket Tactics, Pro Game Guides, and GamesRadar list it expired/inactive. Kept active because official expiry proof was not accessible.

Some broad sources still mention previously expired or new-server-only codes, but this conflicts with stronger established expired context and no direct official proof was accessible. Did not reactivate old expired codes.

No active code had official expiry proof. Current third-party expiry agreement is stronger for some older codes, but active evidence remains from current pages or U7BUY official-Discord/manual-verification claims.

source_conflicts.conflict: GamesRadar lists level 9,000, while indexed Fandom text lists level 12,500 and Ascension IV. Official Roblox does not publish the per-code level gate.
source_conflicts.next_step: Change the Level Eligibility Filter only if accessible official/in-game evidence or stronger current-source agreement contradicts GamesRadar.

source_conflicts.conflict: PCGamesN lists reward bundles for KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW that conflict with Roblox-supported Beebom/Pocket Tactics/G2A/U7BUY reward agreement.
source_conflicts.next_step: Do not change rewards from PCGamesN alone; require official/in-game evidence or broader current-source agreement.

source_conflicts.conflict: Beebom, Pocket Tactics, G2A search evidence, Mobalytics search evidence, PCGamesN, U7BUY, Radio Times search evidence, and indexed Fandom support the June 9/King update group; Pro Game Guides and GamesRadar mark some expired/inactive.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official expiry proof appears or active support drops below the automation threshold.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, U7BUY, Radio Times search evidence, and indexed Fandom support much of the retained May set; Beebom, Pocket Tactics, PCGamesN omission, or Fandom status conflicts exist for parts.
source_conflicts.next_step: Do not expire based on conflicting third-party pages without official proof or broader current agreement.

source_conflicts.conflict: U7BUY, Radio Times, or indexed Fandom mention some previously expired/new-server-only codes, while multiple established current sources treat them as expired or omit them.
source_conflicts.next_step: Reactivate only with direct official/in-game evidence or broad current agreement.
